name: State Bank & Trust Co.
description_short: Community bank in Nevada, Iowa offering personal and business banking, lending, and trust services with local relationship banking and digital access.
description_long: State Bank & Trust Co. is a community bank headquartered in Nevada, Iowa, operating as a traditional full-service financial institution. The bank has been serving personal and business customers in the region with a focus on local relationship banking paired with modern digital capabilities. Founded on principles of community banking, SBT positions itself as offering personalized service with the convenience of anywhere, anytime access through digital channels. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including relationship checking, savings and money market accounts, certificates of deposit, health savings accounts, IRAs, and safe deposit boxes. On the access side, they provide internet banking, mobile banking, enhanced digital banking, debit cards, credit cards, and mobile wallet integration through Greenlight. Their business banking division serves small to mid-sized businesses with commercial checking, commercial savings, business health savings accounts, remote deposit capture, and commercial cash management services. The lending portfolio spans mortgages (home purchase, refinance, new construction, home equity), commercial loans (including ag operating loans, commercial real estate, equipment financing, and SBA loans), and consumer loans (auto loans and personal loans). State Bank & Trust Co. distinguishes itself through agricultural lending expertise, offering specialized ag operating loans and ag real estate loans that reflect their rural Iowa market. They emphasize trust solutions and relationship banking, positioning themselves as a local alternative to larger national banks. The addition of services like ID TheftSmart (partnered with Kroll Fraud Solutions), overdraft protection, and Greenlight debit cards for young people shows attention to modern consumer needs. Their bilingual website support (Spanish) and multiple digital banking channels indicate efforts to serve a diverse community. As a regional community bank, SBT's primary strength lies in local decision-making and personalized service rather than competitive rates or extensive national branch networks. Their agricultural lending focus is valuable for farmers and rural businesses but less relevant for urban consumers. Like most community banks, they likely cannot match the product breadth or technological sophistication of larger national banks, and account minimums or fees may be less competitive. The bank appears well-established and stable but represents a traditional banking model rather than innovation in fintech or alternative lending.
services: Home Equity Loans and Lines of Credit
Commercial Loans and Commercial Real Estate Loans
Agricultural Operating and Real Estate Loans
pros: Specialized agricultural lending including ag operating loans and ag real estate financing, serving rural Iowa farming community
Trust solutions and relationship banking approach emphasizing local decision-making vs. national corporate policies
Comprehensive digital access through internet banking, mobile banking, enhanced digital banking, and mobile wallets
SBA lending program available for small business expansion and startup financing
ID TheftSmart identity theft protection partnered with Kroll Fraud Solutions included in services
Multiple lending products under one roof: mortgages, commercial loans, consumer loans, and equipment financing
Greenlight debit cards integration for youth financial education and family money management
cons: Limited geographic presence as a community bank in Nevada, Iowa; no indication of branch network beyond local area
No mention of competitive interest rates, rate comparisons, or rate guarantees on website
Website content incomplete (ID TheftSmart page cuts off mid-paragraph), suggesting outdated or poorly maintained web presence
No transparency on account minimum balances, monthly fees, or fee structures mentioned on website
Traditional community bank model may lack advanced fintech features and mobile-first tools compared to digital banks
best_for: Farmers and agricultural businesses needing specialized ag lending and operating loans
Small business owners in rural Iowa seeking relationship-based lending and commercial banking services
Individuals in Nevada, Iowa area wanting local community bank relationships with digital convenience
Families interested in youth financial literacy through Greenlight debit card programs
diagnosis: State Bank & Trust Co. is best for rural Iowa residents and agricultural business owners seeking personalized local banking with digital convenience, and small business owners who value relationship-based lending decisions. The main caveat is that as a community bank, they offer limited geographic reach and likely cannot match the rates, technology sophistication, or product breadth of larger national banks or digital-first financial institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
